title: PPIP - Setting persistence when Share Data toggle is ON
scenario: "Share Data" toggle remains ON after app restart when enabled during onboarding via "Continue as Guest"
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (or after clearing app data).
2. On the onboarding screen, tap "Continue as Guest".
3. When prompted, select the option to share data (enable the Share Data toggle).
4. Complete the onboarding flow and reach the Home screen.
5. Force close the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Re-launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected: The "Share Data" toggle remains ON after restarting the app.
